text:
null / llnu is live on Ethereum mainnet.

Two tokens. One protocol.
$null creates. $llnu destroys.

Presale open — 0.002 ETH per share → 25k $null + 50k $llnu.
4 ETH cap. Uniswap v4 pool auto-seeds at cap.

Most airdrops reward you.

null / llnu treats incoming $llnu as a weapon.

After the pool goes live, wallet-to-wallet $llnu can burn an unprotected holder's $null — half gone forever, half to the sender.

Shield cards are the only protection.

Mint on mainnet:
• 0.002 ETH / share
• 25,000 $null + 50,000 $llnu per share
• 0.1 ETH max per wallet
• 4 ETH total raise → LP seeds automatically

No staking. No fake yield. Just the rules.

$null ↔ ETH on Uniswap v4 after launch.

$llnu? Wallet transfers only. Every DEX path blocked.

You can't farm $llnu on a CEX or pool — it's ammunition, not a second memecoin.

Shield cards = timed immunity from incoming $llnu strikes.

Burn fixed $null for 30 / 90 / 365 days:
• 60k / 160k / 460k $null

Permanent burn. No market price games. Renew before expiry to extend.

Pool live → strikes activate.

Send $llnu to another wallet:
If they hold $null with no Shield, part of their $null gets burned and you get rewarded.

Hold $null in LP? Wallet balance = 0 → no strike. Depth helps everyone.

Contracts verified on Etherscan (mainnet v2):

NullToken, LlnuToken, NullProtocolHook — source open.

Dual-token ERC-20 stack + Uniswap v4 hook.

DYOR. Verify addresses before you sign.

Airdrops are weapons, not rewards.

Join the presale. Read the docs. Buy Shield if you plan to hold $null naked in a wallet.

Ethereum mainnet. Mechanism over marketing fluff.

null / llnu 以太坊主网 v2 已上线。

双代币协议：$null 可交易，$llnu 仅钱包转账。

流動池上线后，未受防护的 $null 持有者可能被 $llnu 打击。

防護卡是唯一链上保护。0.002 ETH/份，募集上限 4 ETH。

Why Uniswap v4 hook?

So $llnu never enters a pool. So strikes only happen on intentional wallet transfers. So $null gets a real ETH pair when the raise hits 4 ETH.

Policy enforced on-chain, not in a PDF.
